identity.title: Agent Planning Tools v1
identity.summary: v1: CLI planner reads and authoring (flow-status, template, append/patch WBS) ship before MCP read wrappers (planner-packet, list-ideas, get-plan-artifact, plan-review-packet, finalize-preview-packet) plus agent_start routing. MCP stays read-only per ADR. Legacy build-plan interview deprecated and removed; primary planner-chat remains separate (no unification).

goals: Agents complete Idea→Plan→Tasks without hand-editing files or slurping schemas/playbooks
CLI planner commands ship before MCP wrappers for every v1 read surface
Full P0 MCP read set in v1: planner-packet, list-ideas, get-plan-artifact, plan-review-packet, finalize-preview-packet
Incremental plan authoring via append-wbs-row and patch-plan-artifact in v1
Deprecate and remove legacy build-plan interview path; keep separate from primary planner-chat (no build-plan-for-idea)
nonGoals: MCP mutation tools — read-only MCP per ADR-mcp-adapter-boundary-v1; CLI owns all writes
Full WBS payload in planner-packet (truncated preview only)
assumptions: Ideas module enabled in target workspaces
Existing review-plan-artifact and finalize-plan-to-phase handlers remain canonical

valueAssessment.impact: Unblocks agent planner flow end-to-end with read + incremental authoring
valueAssessment.rationale: Thin CLI-first then MCP wrappers; brainstorm synthesis value 8.0 risk 3.1

riskAssessment.mitigation: 20KB planner-packet; 16KB satellite read tools; truncation ladder in D3
Routing branch only; deep reads via planner-packet

riskAssessment.description: Legacy build-plan removal breaks existing consumers
riskAssessment.mitigation: Deprecation window; dashboard/build-plan session migration notes; keep paths separate not merged

technicalImpact.compatibilityNotes: build-plan interview deprecated then removed; planner-chat is primary path

architecture.overview: CLI-first then MCP read wrappers. agent_start routes; planner-packet deep-reads per idea. MCP read-only only.

decisions.decision: planner-packet includes truncated WBS preview (max 5 rows: wbsId, title, dependsOn, sizingConfidence)
decisions.rationale: Bounded decomposition preview per MCP output budgets

decisions.decision: agent_start lightweight planner routing branch in v1

MCP output budgets: planner-packet 20KB; list-ideas/get-plan-artifact/plan-review-packet/finalize-preview-packet 16KB each. Truncation ladder: drop ideation transcript → reduce WBS 5→3 rows → drop brainstorm synthesis scores → never drop recommendedNextCommand
decisions.rationale: Align with agent-execution-packet (20KB) and phase packet tools (16KB); deterministic overflow handling

decisions.decision: All CLI planner commands ship before their MCP wrapper counterparts
decisions.rationale: Shared runtime source of truth; MCP is adapter not authority

decisions.decision: Full P0 MCP read set in v1 (not v1.1)
decisions.rationale: Operator directive: complete read surface in first release

decisions.decision: append-wbs-row and patch-plan-artifact CLI included in v1
decisions.rationale: Incremental authoring reduces full-artifact resubmit burden

decisions.decision: Legacy build-plan interview deprecated and removed; primary planner-chat stays separate — no build-plan-for-idea merge
decisions.rationale: Operator directive: remove legacy, keep paths separate not unified

decisions.decision: MCP remains read-only; mutations stay CLI with existing policyApproval and planningGeneration standards
decisions.rationale: ADR-mcp-adapter-boundary-v1; no planner mutation profile in v1

criticalPaths: CLI commands exist and pass tests before MCP tool registration
MCP/CLI parity per planner read tool
append-wbs-row and patch-plan-artifact validate against plan-artifact schema

implementationGuidance: Implement and merge CLI commands before MCP wrappers in dependency order
Register all planner MCP tools in output-budgets.ts before shipping
Deprecation notices on build-plan before removal PR
whatNotToDo: Do not enable MCP mutation tools for planner commands in v1
Do not merge build-plan interview into planner-chat
Do not ship MCP wrapper before CLI handler parity exists
